title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 94.020 - Power of council to levy taxes and licenses
text:
94.020.  Power of council to levy taxes and licenses. — The city council shall, from time to time, provide by ordinance for the levy and collection of all taxes, licenses, wharfage and other duties not herein enumerated, and for neglect or refusal to pay the same shall fix such penalties as are now or may hereafter be authorized by law or ordinance.
(RSMo 1939 § 6932) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6786; 1919 § 8273; 1909 § 9210 
City improvements, special tax bills may be issued for, 88.507, 88.510 
Indebtedness, tax for sinking fund and interest to pay, 95.330, 95.345
